commands: vp migrate --no-interactive # a version-update defers legacy husky hooks to --full
git config --local core.hooksPath # still husky's .husky/_ (not overridden)
vp migrate --hooks --no-interactive # --hooks overrides husky's core.hooksPath and migrates hooks
cat package.json # husky/lint-staged should be removed, prepare should be vp config
cat .vite-hooks/pre-commit # pre-commit hook should be rewritten
